constraints.name: app_announcement_popup_position_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (popup_background_position::text = ANY (ARRAY['center'::character varying, 'top center'::character varying, 'top left'::character varying, 'top right'::character varying, 'bottom center'::character varying, 'bottom left'::character varying, 'bottom right'::character varying, 'left center'::character varying, 'right center'::character varying]::text[]))

constraints.name: app_announcement_publish_window_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (publish_start_time IS NULL OR publish_end_time IS NULL OR publish_start_time < publish_end_time)

constraints.name: app_page_enable_platform_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (enable_platform IS NULL OR enable_platform <@ ARRAY[1::smallint, 2::smallint, 3::smallint])

constraints.name: check_in_record_reward_resolution_consistent_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (resolved_reward_items IS NULL AND resolved_reward_source_type IS NULL AND resolved_reward_rule_key IS NULL OR resolved_reward_items IS NOT NULL AND (resolved_reward_source_type = ANY (ARRAY[1, 2, 3])))

constraints.name: check_in_streak_rule_effective_window_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > effective_from)

constraints.name: coupon_definition_discount_ability_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (coupon_type <> 2 OR target_scope = 1 AND (discount_amount > 0 OR discount_rate_bps < 10000))

constraints.name: coupon_redemption_record_target_reference_shape_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK ((target_type = ANY (ARRAY[1, 2])) AND target_id IS NOT NULL OR (target_type = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4])) AND target_id IS NULL)

constraints.name: emoji_asset_kind_custom_required_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (kind <> 2 OR shortcode IS NOT NULL AND image_url IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: emoji_asset_kind_unicode_required_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (kind <> 1 OR unicode_sequence IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: forum_moderator_permissions_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (permissions IS NULL OR permissions <@ ARRAY[1::smallint, 2::smallint, 3::smallint, 4::smallint, 5::smallint, 6::smallint])

constraints.name: forum_governance_action_log_moderator_presence_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (actor_type = 1 AND moderator_id IS NOT NULL OR actor_type = 2 AND moderator_id IS NULL)

constraints.name: forum_moderator_application_permissions_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (permissions IS NULL OR permissions <@ ARRAY[1::smallint, 2::smallint, 3::smallint, 4::smallint, 5::smallint, 6::smallint])

constraints.name: forum_moderator_lifecycle_log_subject_present_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (moderator_id IS NOT NULL OR application_id IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: forum_moderator_section_permissions_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (permissions IS NULL OR permissions <@ ARRAY[1::smallint, 2::smallint, 3::smallint, 4::smallint, 5::smallint, 6::smallint])

constraints.name: growth_reward_rule_asset_key_not_blank_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK ((asset_type = ANY (ARRAY[1, 2])) AND btrim(asset_key::text) = ''::text OR (asset_type = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 5])) AND btrim(asset_key::text) <> ''::text)

constraints.name: growth_reward_settlement_processing_lease_pair_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (processing_token IS NULL AND processing_started_at IS NULL OR processing_token IS NOT NULL AND processing_started_at IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: growth_rule_usage_counter_user_id_asset_type_asset_key_rul_key
constraints.definition: UNIQUE (user_id, asset_type, asset_key, rule_key, scope_type, scope_key)

constraints.name: notification_delivery_task_reminder_lookup_required_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (category_key::text <> 'task_reminder'::text OR task_id IS NOT NULL AND assignment_id IS NOT NULL AND reminder_kind IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: task_definition_publish_window_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (start_at IS NULL OR end_at IS NULL OR start_at <= end_at)

constraints.name: task_event_failure_processing_lease_pair_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (processing_token IS NULL AND processing_started_at IS NULL AND processing_expired_at IS NULL OR processing_token IS NOT NULL AND processing_started_at IS NOT NULL AND processing_expired_at IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: user_asset_balance_asset_key_not_blank_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK ((asset_type = ANY (ARRAY[1, 2])) AND btrim(asset_key::text) = ''::text OR (asset_type = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 5])) AND btrim(asset_key::text) <> ''::text)

constraints.name: user_comment_root_floor_required_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (reply_to_id IS NOT NULL OR floor IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: user_content_entitlement_grant_source_reference_shape_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK ((grant_source = ANY (ARRAY[1, 2, 3])) AND source_id IS NOT NULL OR (grant_source = ANY (ARRAY[4, 5])) AND source_key IS NOT NULL AND length(btrim(source_key::text)) > 0)

constraints.name: user_level_rule_business_trimmed_not_blank_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (business IS NULL OR business::text = btrim(business::text) AND business::text <> ''::text)

constraints.name: user_notification_system_announcement_requires_id_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (category_key::text <> 'system_announcement'::text OR announcement_id IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: work_chapter_content_type_valid_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (work_type = 1 AND novel_content_path IS NULL OR work_type = 2 AND comic_content_manifest IS NULL)

constraints.name: workflow_job_operator_user_id_scope_chk
constraints.definition: CHECK (operator_type = 1 AND operator_user_id IS NOT NULL OR operator_type = 2 AND operator_user_id IS NULL)
